english: to lower / to reduce / to drop
notes: Can also be used reflexively as 'sich senken' meaning 'to sink / to descend / to drop' (e.g. die Temperatur senkt sich). The non-reflexive form takes an accusative object.

sentences.german: Die Regierung will die Steuern senken.
sentences.english: The government wants to lower taxes.

sentences.german: Das Unternehmen hat die Preise um zehn Prozent gesenkt.
sentences.english: The company has reduced prices by ten percent.

sentences.german: Er senkte den Blick, als er gefragt wurde.
sentences.english: He lowered his gaze when he was asked.
